REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS STEVE KIM AND ANADELIA KIM'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND ANTI-SLAPP SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT [CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16] IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY SUSTAINED ITS BURDEN UNDER THE THE FIRST PRONG TO SHOW THAT ALL CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF THE FILING OF THE SMALL CLAIMS ACTIONS (IN PURPORTED VIOLATION OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT) ARE PROTECTED UNDER CCP 425.16. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN AND THE SECOND PRONG BY SHOWING PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS AND LITIGATION PRIVILEGE IS NOT ADEQUATELY ADDRESSED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Set For Trial On Jan-30-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees For Prevailing Defendant On Anti-Slapp Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anna A. Leong; Law Offices of Anna Leong; 415-861-0727; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Yung Joo Kwong, et al.

No other appearances.

Plaintiff's counsel appears to contest the court's tentative ruling, and states that the matter has settled and that she has submitted a Request for Dismissal for electronic filing. The court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR PREVAILING ON ANTI-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE is off calendar.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees For Prevailing Defendant On Anti-Slapp Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Jul-14-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT STEVE KIM, ANADELIA KIM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees For Prevailing Defendant On Anti-Slapp Special Motion To Strike is continued to July 14, 2022 for the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than June 24, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-31-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Anti-Slapp Special Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint [Code Of Civil Procedure 425.16]
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anna A. Leong; Law Offices of Anna Leong; 415-861-0727; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiffs Yung Joo Kwon, Helen Kwon, and Lynda Kwon.
Micah A. H. Yospe; Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP; 415-278-9400; appearing via CourtCall on behalf of defendants Steve Kim and Anadelia B. Kim.

Plaintiffs' counsel contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS STEVE KIM AND ANADELIA KIM'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND ANTI-SLAPP SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT [CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16] is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden under the the first prong to show that all claims arising out of the filing of the small claims actions (in purported violation of the settlement agreement) are protected under CCP 425.16. Plaintiff failed to sustain their burden and the second prong by showing probability of prevailing on the merits and litigation privilege is not adequately addressed.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
